name: French Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Frozen hashbrown potatoes, partially thawed or 1 1/2 cups grated potatoes
1/2 teaspoon Dried chervil or summer savory leaves
1 container (8 oz) Fat-free egg product, thawed (or 2 eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except olive oil; mix well.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, heat 1 teaspoon of the oil over medium-high heat until hot. Spoon about 1/4 of the potato mixture into the skillet and spread slightly. Cook for 4-5 minutes without stirring, until the bottom is brown. Flip the pancake and cook the other side for 3-4 minutes or until brown and thoroughly cooked.
3. Slide the pancake onto a serving platter and keep warm. Repeat with remaining oil and mixture. Garnish with additional parsley and green onion if desired.
